title: tabp .lock
description: Project-folder lock held while a screen-cvs run is in_progress. Written to <project>/.tabp/.lock. Stale locks (process gone, different host) are reported for manual removal, never auto-stolen. Released when the run transitions out of in_progress status.

pid.description: PID of the process holding the lock.

hostname.description: Hostname of the machine holding the lock.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime when the lock was acquired.

run_id.description: Run identifier this lock was acquired for. Ownership travels with run_id (stable across the short-lived helper subprocesses), so run-finalize can release the lock that run-start acquired in an earlier process. Null only for locks written by a direct _acquire_lock call without a run_id.
